symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker. Motor frame burning hot (`117`°C) with `severe` smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Phase loss on 460V incoming feed caused single-phasing thermal burnout of cooling tower induction motor windings.
action_taken: Removed failed cooling tower fan motor using crane, installed severe-duty TEFC replacement motor, renewed shaft alignment, and sealed terminal box with RTV.
parts_used: Severe-Duty TEFC Cooling Tower Motor 25HP, Composite Coupling Element, RTV Silicone Sealant

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight of scale deposits.
root_cause: Failure of chemical scale inhibitor/dispersant dosing pump allowed calcium carbonate hardness to exceed saturation index.
action_taken: Circulated bio-dispersant and mild descaling agent through tower loop for 12 hours, flushed cold water basin, and serviced bleed-off solenoid.
parts_used: Distribution Nozzle Replacement Set (20-Pack), Conductivity Controller Probe, Chemical Pump Peristaltic Tubing

symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker. Motor frame burning hot (`118`°C) with `minor` smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Prolonged operation in saturated 100% humidity environment degraded Class F insulation varnish beyond dielectric limit.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor and gearbox shaft coupling element, sealed conduit connections against moisture ingress, and performed laser alignment.
parts_used: Severe-Duty TEFC Cooling Tower Motor 25HP, Composite Coupling Element, RTV Silicone Sealant

symptom_description: Cooling tower basin water temperature rising above `32°C` alarm setpoint (`concerning` spike). Fan motor stationary (`0 Amps` draw).
root_cause: Severe bearing seizure due to water wash-out of grease in vertical fan motor lower bearing during heavy monsoon/spray conditions.
action_taken: Swapped out burned cooling tower fan motor with spare severe-duty VFD-rated motor, replaced flexible shaft coupling, and verified fan pitch balance.
parts_used: Inverter-Duty Fan Motor Assembly, Lower Bearing Waterproof Lip Seal, Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Cooling tower water distribution nozzles partially clogged with lime crust, causing uneven water channeling across fill pack.
root_cause: High cycles of concentration (`> 6.0`) operated without adequate bleed-off rate due to stuck automatic conductivity blowdown valve.
action_taken: Manually cleaned clogged distribution nozzles, pressure washed top deck and fill media, replaced broken fill sections, and reset blowdown conductivity controller to 1500 uS/cm.
parts_used: Distribution Nozzle Replacement Set (20-Pack), Conductivity Controller Probe, Chemical Pump Peristaltic Tubing

symptom_description: Heavy white/brown mineral scale (`sharp` crust thickness) visible on PVC fill media and drift eliminators during weekly inspection.
root_cause: High cycles of concentration (`> 6.0`) operated without adequate bleed-off rate due to stuck automatic conductivity blowdown valve.
action_taken: Descaled distribution header and nozzles, vacuumed scale debris from cold water basin, and repaired chemical scale inhibitor dosing pump tubing.
parts_used: Cooling Tower Spray Nozzles (12-Pack), Conductivity Blowdown Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit

symptom_description: Loud significant grinding high-pitched squealing sound from cooling tower fan gearbox/motor coupling. Fan blades spinning erratically. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on CHILL-302.
root_cause: Phase loss on 460V incoming feed caused single-phasing thermal burnout of cooling tower induction motor windings.
action_taken: Removed failed cooling tower fan motor using crane, installed severe-duty TEFC replacement motor, renewed shaft alignment, and sealed terminal box with RTV.
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Tower Induction Motor, Flexible Drive Shaft Coupling, Motor Rain Canopy

symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`minor` higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.37` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on CHILL-302.
root_cause: Broken distribution basin covers allowed direct sunlight ingress, accelerating rapid algae growth that blinded distribution target nozzles.
action_taken: Removed hot water basin covers, manually cleared leaves/debris from all distribution nozzles, pressure washed basin, and chlorinated loop.
parts_used: Replacement Distribution Nozzles (24-Pack), Coarse Mesh Inlet Strainer Basket, Shock Biocide (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Dry patches (`severe` un-wetted area) visible across top of PVC fill media. Hot water basin overflowing around distribution basin edges.
root_cause: Accumulation of wind-blown leaves, plastic wrappers, and organic debris in hot water distribution basin plugging nozzle orifices.
action_taken: Replaced 14 broken or missing distribution nozzles, removed heavy algae mats from hot water basin deck, and installed opaque UV-blocking basin covers.
parts_used: Non-Clog Distribution Nozzle Assembly (18-Pack), Basin Sealing Gasket Strip

symptom_description: Dry patches (`concerning` un-wetted area) visible across top of PVC fill media. Hot water basin overflowing around distribution basin edges.
root_cause: Broken distribution basin covers allowed direct sunlight ingress, accelerating rapid algae growth that blinded distribution target nozzles.
action_taken: Replaced 14 broken or missing distribution nozzles, removed heavy algae mats from hot water basin deck, and installed opaque UV-blocking basin covers.
parts_used: Polypropylene Target Spray Nozzles (15-Pack), Basin Cover Fasteners

symptom_description: Dry patches (`minor` un-wetted area) visible across top of PVC fill media. Hot water basin overflowing around distribution basin edges.
root_cause: Rust flakes and pipe corrosion scales from upstream carbon steel condenser water piping carried into tower distribution header.
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned 36 target spray nozzles, flushed main distribution header piping, installed new coarse inlet strainer baskets, and shock-chlorinated tower.
parts_used: Non-Clog Distribution Nozzle Assembly (18-Pack), Basin Sealing Gasket Strip

root_cause: Prolonged operation in saturated 100% humidity environment degraded Class F insulation varnish beyond dielectric limit.
action_taken: Installed new vertical fan drive motor, renewed motor shaft seal and rain canopy, greased bearings with waterproof grease, and tested VFD speed steps.
